items.title: Palm Vein Biometric Module
items.description: Contactless palm vein scanner module. Near-infrared imaging, liveness detection, anti-spoofing. Ideal for access control, time attendance, and identity verification.

items.title: Face + Palm Vein Terminal
items.description: All-in-one biometric terminal combining facial recognition with palm vein technology. Dual-mode authentication. 8-inch touchscreen. PoE / Wi-Fi / 4G support.

items.title: Android POS Terminal
items.description: Smart POS device with thermal printer, NFC, barcode scanner. Android OS. Supports payment integration. Compact design for retail, restaurant, and mobile payment.

items.title: Portable Mobile Time & Attendance Terminals
items.description: 8-inch portable time clocks with facial recognition, palm vein authentication, and pre-shift breathalyzer integration. Built for construction sites, remote workforces, and field operations.
